items.excerpt: DNN Platform has multi-tenancy baked into its core for over two decades. By leveraging its "Portals" architecture, you can run an unlimited number of distinct websites from a single IIS application. The entire site structure, content, and user base are stored in the SQL Server database.
items.recap_neutral: DNN Platform has multi-tenancy baked into its core for over two decades
